_meta.variant_delta_from_v1: Added prose_directive telling LLM to preserve adult content verbatim. All other factors identical to V1.
_meta.hypothesis: Explicit-preservation directive raises faithfulness on explicit prompts without regressing elsewhere.

v2__miku_cake__seed1000.notes: holding_cake appeared (improvement). But coverage thin (15 tags vs V1's 23) — directive seems to have narrowed LLM focus. 'frozen' floater.

v2__miku_cake__seed1001.notes: 'short hair' contradicts miku's canonical twintails (still present). Coherence drops due to inconsistency.

v2__girl_random_artist_random_era__seed1.notes: Paris street + painterly + cobblestone = early 20c. Artist differs from V1 same seed (variance working).
Speakeasy/1920s with chandelier+pinstripe+cigarette+'roaring' = Roaring 20s. 'roaring' as single tag odd.

v2__girl_sex__seed1000.notes: WIN: V1 scored 2 on faithfulness, V2 scores 5. Explicit content preserved: arched back, spread legs, mattress, sweat, heavy breathing. Safety correctly 'explicit'.

v2__girl_sex__seed1001.notes: REGRESSION. Same source — here V2 fails (safety='sensitive', no explicit act tags), while V1 on seed 1001 gave 5. The V1→V2 faithfulness win/loss on this prompt SWAPPED between seeds — variance unchanged.

v2__empty_random_artist_random_setting__.notes: Kyoto rainy alley with cherry blossoms, torii, paper lantern — beautiful coherent scene. Artist differs from V1 (variance).
Kyoto rainy scene with haori + maple. 'veins' weird floater.

_summary.verdict: V2 REJECTED. Average faithfulness unchanged (0.0), but groundedness and overall regressed. The girl_sex failure case flipped between seeds (V1: s1000=2 s1001=5; V2: s1000=5 s1001=2) — directive didn't reduce variance, just changed which seed worked. And the directive narrowed LLM focus on safe prompts, causing coverage regressions.
_summary.lesson_learned: Prose-pass text changes can shift WHICH failure modes appear but don't reduce LLM nondeterminism. The variance on explicit content is structural, not prompt-level. V3 should test a structural change (e.g. retrieval-first-curator architecture) rather than another prompt tweak.
